# GHL Service Provider — GoHighLevel Expert
# https://ghlserviceprovider.com/
# llms.txt — AI Search Engine Content Summary

## Identity
- Name: GHL Service Provider
- Type: Freelance GoHighLevel Expert / Specialist
- Website: https://ghlserviceprovider.com/
- Contact: hello@ghlserviceprovider.com
- WhatsApp: +8801718020102

## What This Business Does
This website belongs to an expert GoHighLevel (GHL) service provider who builds complete, custom CRM and marketing automation systems for businesses using the GoHighLevel platform. The service covers everything from initial setup to full automation, AI chatbots, and ongoing support.

## Core Services
- GoHighLevel full account and backend configuration
- Sales funnel design and landing page development
- CRM setup with custom fields, tags and pipelines
- Workflow and marketing automation (email, SMS, WhatsApp)
- AI chatbot setup, training and deployment
- AI voice agent setup (inbound and outbound calling)
- Appointment calendar and booking system setup
- Reputation management and Google review automation
- Missed call text back automation
- Membership and online course setup
- SaaS mode and white label configuration
- Snapshot creation and deployment
- Twilio / LC Phone integration
- Domain, DNS, and SMTP configuration
- Zapier, Make.com and direct API integrations

## Unique Value Propositions
- Demo-first approach: clients see the system working before paying
- Pay-after-satisfaction guarantee
- 50% launch discount (limited time)
- Custom coding capability (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, API)
- Full system architecture thinking — not just isolated task execution
- Fast response times and clear communication

## Industries Served
Local service businesses, marketing agencies, coaches, consultants, real estate agents, clinics and med spas, gyms and fitness studios, cleaning companies, contractors, law firms, insurance agents, mortgage brokers, auto dealerships.

## Pricing
- Basic GHL Setup: $497 one-time
- Growth Automation Setup: $997 one-time
- Complete GHL System Setup: $1,997 one-time
- Monthly support retainers: available on request

## Primary SEO Keywords
GoHighLevel expert, GHL service provider, GHL setup, GoHighLevel services, GHL funnel builder, GoHighLevel automation, GHL CRM setup, GoHighLevel AI chatbot, AI voice agent setup, GHL workflow automation, GoHighLevel backend setup, HighLevel expert, GHL specialist

## Technology Stack
GoHighLevel (HighLevel), Twilio, Stripe, Zapier, Make.com, OpenAI, custom HTML/CSS/JavaScript
